## Review

_Congratulations, you've completed this exercise and learned the core Git workflow for safe collaboration and recovery._

<img src="https://octodex.github.com/images/jetpacktocat.png" alt="celebrate" width=200 align=right>

Here's a recap of your accomplishments:

- Created meaningful commits that captured intent.
- Isolated work in a feature branch and proposed changes with a pull request.
- Merged approved changes and inspected repository history.
- Recovered safely from a mistake by creating a revert commit.

### What's next?

- [GitHub flow quickstart](https://docs.github.com/en/get-started/quickstart/github-flow)
- [Resolve merge conflicts](https://docs.github.com/en/get-started/using-git/resolving-merge-conflicts-after-a-git-rebase)
- [Explore more GitHub Skills](https://learn.github.com/skills)
